description_long: This is a freestanding shelving unit featuring a sturdy black metal frame and four spacious wooden shelves with a warm brown finish. The frame is constructed from rectangular metal tubing, providing both structural support and a modern industrial aesthetic. Each shelf is flat and open, allowing for easy access and versatile storage of various items. The top and bottom shelves are aligned with the frame, while the middle shelves are evenly spaced, maximizing usable storage area. The open sides and back make it suitable for placement against a wall or as a room divider in urban environments such as garages, workshops, or public spaces. The overall design is minimalist, functional, and robust, ideal for supporting books, tools, or decorative objects.
description: A freestanding shelving unit with a black metal frame and four brown wooden shelves, designed for sturdy and versatile storage. Its open, minimalist design suits urban environments and provides easy access to stored items.
description_view_0: Front view showing all four wooden shelves framed by black metal, with open sides and back.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the narrow profile of the shelving unit and the thickness of the shelves.
description_view_2: Rear view, visually similar to the front, displaying the open structure and shelf alignment.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again showing the slim profile and shelf arrangement.
